name: Grilled Hamburgers with Sour Cream and Herbs
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Minced fresh thyme or 1 teaspoon Dried thyme
1 teaspoon Minced fresh rosemary OR 1/4 teaspoon Dried, crumbled rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, thoroughly combine the first six ingredients.
2. Shape the beef mixture into 8 patties, each about 1 inch thick.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour or up to 8 hours.
4. Prepare the barbecue on medium-high heat.
5. Place the burgers on the grill.
6. Cover the grill and cook the burgers to your desired doneness (about 4 minutes for medium rare).
